author: śrīla rūpa gosvāmī
verses:
sīdati sakhi mama hṛdayamadhīram
jadabhajamiha na hi gokula⋅vīram

nākarṇamatisuhṛdupadeśam
mādhava⋅cāṭu⋅paṭalamapi leśam

nālokayamarpitamuruhāram
praṇamantañca dayitamanuvāram

hanta sanātana⋅guṇamabhiyāntam
kimadhārayamahamurasi na kāntam
en_translation:
My unsteady heart languishes, O friend, because I did not worship the hero of Gokula here.

I did not listen to the advice of very dear friends, nor even a bit of the flattering words of Mādhava.

I did not behold the offered great garland, nor my beloved bowing down again and again.

Alas! Why did I not hold my beloved to my chest, who embodies eternal qualities?
